inputSnapshot.description: The exact inputs the decision saw, as-of evaluation time.

firedDecisions.description: Which decisions evaluated, in what order.

intermediateValues.description: Outputs of upstream DRD decisions and named FEEL sub-expressions.

outputs.description: The final decision outputs (the leaf decisions' results).

authorityAttribution.description: Member-outcome → emitting authority, carried through composite decisions.

hasErrors.description: True when any fired decision produced an evaluation error.

description:
The typed evaluation trace every `evaluate` emits (doc 03 §7) — not a log line, a typed domain
object. It flows into the per-Case DecisionRecord and the why API, so this shape is **frozen**:
the `decision-layer` trace-shape harness validates every emitted trace against it.
